Dr. Elena Ramirez
Head of Data & AI
elena.ramirez@example.com | +34 91 555 0199
Location: Madrid, Spain

Summary
Leader with 12 years of experience across AI SaaS, healthtech, and e-commerce organizations.
Built NLP and machine learning teams, led platform strategy, and hired senior engineers and data scientists.

Skills
Python, Machine Learning, NLP, Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, Leadership, Communication

Work Experience
Head of Data & AI at Nova Health | 2021 - Present | Directed applied AI roadmap, hiring, and platform architecture for healthtech analytics.
Director of Machine Learning at Commerce Atlas | 2017 - 2021 | Led recommendation systems and experimentation programs for e-commerce growth.
Senior Data Scientist at Signal Works | 2013 - 2017 | Built NLP classification pipelines and stakeholder reporting.

Education
PhD, Computer Science, Universidad Politecnica de Madrid

Certifications
Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer | Google | 2022
